description: Implement the Agent Intelligence (Kecerdasan Agent) page with 4-tier memory system visualization, self-improvement loop tracking, knowledge graph viewer, hybrid search, and agent health dashboard. Includes all supporting API routes.
steps: Create API routes at src/app/api/agent/memory/route.ts - GET (list memories with filter by tier, search) and POST (create memory entry). Include a consolidation endpoint at src/app/api/agent/memory/consolidate/route.ts that simulates memory consolidation (moves old working memories to episodic, etc.)

Create API routes at src/app/api/agent/learning/route.ts - GET (list insights with filter by type, applied status) and POST (create insight). Include PUT at src/app/api/agent/learning/[id]/route.ts for marking insights as applied.

Create API routes at src/app/api/agent/graph/route.ts - GET (list entities with relations) and POST (create entity). src/app/api/agent/graph/relations/route.ts for POST (create relation between entities). Include a visualization-friendly format that returns nodes and edges.

Create API route at src/app/api/agent/search/route.ts - POST handler that implements hybrid search across knowledge entries and memories using BM25-style keyword scoring combined with simple text similarity. Returns ranked results with relevance scores.

Create API route at src/app/api/agent/health/route.ts - GET handler returning agent health metrics: total memories per tier, knowledge coverage (entries per category), learning insights count, average confidence scores, recent activity timestamps, response quality estimate.
Create the main page at src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/page.tsx as a server component with tab-based layout: Memori, Pembelajaran, Graf Pengetahuan, Pencarian, Kesehatan

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/components/MemoryPanel.tsx - visualization of 4-tier memory with cards showing Working (real-time), Episodic (summaries), Semantic (facts), Procedural (patterns). Each tier shows count, recent entries, and has a consolidation trigger button.

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/components/LearningPanel.tsx - shows self-improvement insights: patterns discovered, suggested improvements, corrections from admin, confidence trend. Admin can approve/apply suggestions.

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/components/KnowledgeGraphPanel.tsx - simple visual representation of entity relationships using cards/badges showing entities as nodes and relations as connecting labels. Filter by entity type.

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/components/HybridSearchPanel.tsx - search interface that queries across all knowledge and memory. Shows results with relevance scores, source tier/category badges, and highlights matching terms.

Create component src/app/(dashboard)/kecerdasan/components/HealthDashboard.tsx - overview cards with metrics: Memory Health (entries per tier with progress bars), Knowledge Coverage (radar/bar chart showing coverage per category), Learning Progress (insights applied vs pending), Response Quality (estimated score based on feedback ratings), System Activity (last consolidation, last learning cycle timestamps).
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to /kecerdasan shows the Agent Intelligence page with 5 tabs
Memory tab shows 4-tier visualization with real data from AgentMemory table
Admin can trigger memory consolidation which processes working memories into higher tiers
Learning tab shows insights and allows admin to approve/apply suggestions
Knowledge Graph tab displays entities and their relationships visually
Hybrid Search performs search across knowledge base and memory, returns scored results
Health Dashboard shows accurate metrics calculated from actual database data
All API routes handle errors gracefully and return proper status codes
verification: Run: npm run build - should compile without TypeScript errors
Run: npm run lint - should pass or show only pre-existing warnings
